title: Settings
appearance.showFilenameInTitlebar.label: Show filename in titlebar
appearance.showFilenameInTitlebar.descri: Display the current file name in the window title
appearance.autoHideStatusBar.label: Auto-hide status bar
appearance.autoHideStatusBar.description: Hide status bar when not interacting
editor.latinFont.label: Latin Font
editor.cjkFont.label: CJK Font
editor.monoFont.label: Mono Font
editor.fontSize.label: Font Size
editor.lineHeight.label: Line Height
editor.blockSpacing.label: Block Spacing
editor.cjkLetterSpacing.label: CJK Letter Spacing
editor.editorWidth.label: Editor Width
editor.tabSize.label: Tab size
editor.tabSize.description: Number of spaces inserted when pressing Tab
editor.autoPair.label: Enable auto-pairing
editor.autoPair.description: Automatically insert closing brackets and quotes
editor.cjkBrackets.label: CJK brackets
editor.curlyQuotes.label: Include curly quotes
editor.curlyQuotes.description: Auto-pair “” and ‘’ (may conflict with IME smart quotes)
editor.rightDoubleQuote.label: Also pair ”
editor.rightDoubleQuote.description: Typing ” inserts “” pair (helps when IME alternates open/close)
editor.copyFormat.label: Copy format
editor.copyFormat.description: What to put in plain text when copying from WYSIWYG
editor.copyOnSelect.label: Copy on select
editor.copyOnSelect.description: Automatically copy selected text to clipboard
editor.lineEndings.label: Line endings on save
editor.lineEndings.description: Preserve original line endings or normalize on save
editor.preserveLineBreaks.label: Preserve consecutive line breaks
editor.preserveLineBreaks.description: Keep multiple blank lines as-is (don't collapse)
editor.hardBreakStyle.label: Hard break style on save
editor.hardBreakStyle.description: Two spaces works everywhere. Backslash may fail on Reddit/Jekyll.
editor.showBrTags.label:
Show
tags
editor.showBrTags.description: Display HTML line break tags visibly in editor
editor.largeFile.autoSourceMode.label: Open files over 1 MB in Source mode
editor.largeFile.autoSourceMode.descript: Opens instantly in Source mode. Switch to WYSIWYG from the status bar any time.
editor.largeFile.warnAbove5MB.label: Warn before opening files over 5 MB
editor.largeFile.warnAbove5MB.descriptio: Show a confirmation dialog before opening very large files. Files above 50 MB are always refused.
language.interfaceLanguage.label: Interface language
language.interfaceLanguage.description: Language used for menus and UI text
language.cjkFormatting.hint: Formatting rules for CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) text. Use Format > Format CJK Text (Cmd+Shift+F) to apply.
language.fullwidthAlphanumeric.label: Convert fullwidth letters/numbers
language.fullwidthPunctuation.label: Normalize punctuation width
language.fullwidthParentheses.label: Convert parentheses
language.fullwidthBrackets.label: Convert brackets
language.cjkEnglishSpacing.label: Add CJK-English spacing
language.cjkParenthesisSpacing.label: Add CJK-parenthesis spacing
language.currencySpacing.label: Remove currency spacing
language.slashSpacing.label: Remove slash spacing
language.spaceCollapsing.label: Collapse multiple spaces
language.dashConversion.label: Convert dashes
language.emdashSpacing.label: Fix em-dash spacing
language.smartQuoteConversion.label: Convert straight quotes
language.quoteStyle.label: Quote style
language.quoteSpacing.label: Fix double quote spacing
language.singleQuoteSpacing.label: Fix single quote spacing
language.cjkCornerQuotes.label: CJK corner quotes
language.cjkNestedQuotes.label: Nested corner quotes
language.consecutivePunctuation.label: Limit consecutive punctuation
language.trailingSpaces.label: Remove trailing spaces
language.trailingSpaces.description: Remove spaces at end of lines
language.ellipsisNormalization.label: Normalize ellipsis
language.newlineCollapsing.label: Collapse newlines
markdown.enableRegexSearch.label: Enable regex in search
markdown.enableRegexSearch.description: Show regex toggle button in Find & Replace bar
markdown.smartPaste.label: Smart paste Markdown
markdown.smartPaste.description: Convert pasted Markdown text into rich content in WYSIWYG
markdown.blockFontSize.label: Block element font size
markdown.blockFontSize.description: Font size for lists, blockquotes, tables, alerts, and details
markdown.headingAlignment.label: Heading alignment
markdown.mediaBorder.label: Image & diagram borders
markdown.mediaBorder.description: Show borders around images, Mermaid diagrams, and math blocks
markdown.mediaAlignment.label: Image & table alignment
markdown.mediaAlignment.description: Horizontal alignment for block images and tables
markdown.tableFitToWidth.label: Fit tables to width
markdown.tableFitToWidth.description: Constrain all tables to the editor width instead of allowing horizontal scroll
markdown.htmlRendering.label: Raw HTML in rich text
markdown.htmlRendering.description: Control whether raw HTML is hidden or rendered (sanitized)
markdown.lintEnabled.label: Enable markdown lint
markdown.lintEnabled.description: Check for common markdown issues (broken links, missing alt text, heading increments, etc.)
files.showHiddenFiles.label: Show hidden files
files.showHiddenFiles.description: Include dotfiles and hidden system items in the file explorer
files.showAllFiles.label: Show all files
files.showAllFiles.description: Show non-markdown files in the file explorer (opens with system default app)
files.confirmQuit.label: Confirm quit
files.confirmQuit.descriptionMac: Press ⌘Q twice to quit — prevents accidental exits
files.confirmQuit.descriptionOther: Press Ctrl+Q twice to quit — prevents accidental exits
files.autoSave.label: Enable auto-save
files.saveInterval.label: Save interval
files.keepHistory.label: Keep document history
files.keepHistory.description: Track versions for undo and recovery
files.maxVersions.label: Maximum versions
files.keepVersionsFor.label: Keep versions for
files.mergeWindow.label: Merge window
files.mergeWindow.description: Consecutive auto-saves within this window consolidate into one snapshot
files.maxFileSize.label: Max file size for history
files.maxFileSize.description: Skip history snapshots for files larger than this
files.autoResize.label: Auto-resize on paste
files.autoResize.description: Automatically resize large images before saving to assets
files.copyToAssets.label: Copy to assets folder
files.copyToAssets.description: Copy pasted/dropped images to the document's assets folder
files.cleanupOrphans.label: Clean up unused images on close
files.cleanupOrphans.description: Automatically delete images from assets folder that are no longer referenced in the document
files.pandoc.label: Pandoc
files.pandoc.description: Universal document converter — enables Export → Other Formats
files.pandoc.installHint: Install Pandoc to export to DOCX, EPUB, LaTeX, and more.
integrations.enableMcp.label: Enable MCP Server
integrations.enableMcp.description: Allow AI assistants to control VMark editor
integrations.startOnLaunch.label: Start on launch
integrations.autoApprove.label: Auto-approve edits
integrations.autoApprove.description: Apply AI changes without preview (use with caution)
integrations.mcpInfo.portNote: Port auto-assigned. AI clients discover it automatically.
integrations.installMcp.hint: Configure AI assistants to connect to VMark MCP server.
integrations.installMcp.safetyBackup: A backup will be created before modifying the existing configuration.
integrations.installMcp.safetyNew: A new configuration file will be created.
integrations.installMcp.restartHint: — Restart the AI provider to apply changes.
integrations.detectCli.label: Detect CLI Providers
integrations.detectCli.description: Scan for installed AI CLIs (claude, codex, gemini, ollama)
terminal.shell.label: Shell
terminal.shell.description: Which shell to use. Requires terminal restart.
terminal.panelPosition.label: Panel Position
terminal.panelPosition.description: Where to place the terminal panel. Auto switches based on window aspect ratio.
terminal.panelSize.label: Panel Size
terminal.panelSize.description: Proportion of available space. Drag-resizing the panel also updates this value.
terminal.fontSize.label: Font Size
terminal.lineHeight.label: Line Height
terminal.cursorStyle.label: Cursor Style
terminal.cursorBlink.label: Cursor Blink
terminal.copyOnSelect.label: Copy on Select
terminal.copyOnSelect.description: Automatically copy selected text to clipboard
terminal.webgl.label: WebGL Renderer
terminal.webgl.description: Use GPU-accelerated rendering. Disable if you experience IME input issues. Requires terminal restart.
terminal.macOptionIsMeta.label: Option as Meta Key
terminal.macOptionIsMeta.description: Treat macOS Option key as Meta for Alt+Arrow word navigation. Disable if you need dead-key accent composition (Option+E/N/U).
about.downloadProgress.label: Downloading update...
about.autoUpdates.label: Automatic updates
about.checkForUpdates.label: Check for updates
shortcuts.hint: Click a shortcut to change it.
shortcuts.capture.title: Set Shortcut
shortcuts.capture.conflictUsedBy: This key is already used by
advanced.devTools.label: Developer tools
advanced.devTools.description: Enable developer mode and show dev tools below
advanced.customProtocols.label: Custom link protocols
advanced.customProtocols.hint: Additional URL protocols to recognize when inserting links (e.g., obsidian, vscode)
advanced.keepBothEditors.label: Keep both editors alive
advanced.keepBothEditors.description: Faster mode switching at the cost of higher memory usage
advanced.workflowEngine.label: Workflow Engine
advanced.workflowEngine.description: Enable YAML workflow files with React Flow visualization (experimental)
advanced.hotExit.hint: Test hot exit session capture and restore without actual updates.
